---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ArkManiaGest
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve, or what use case is currently
missing?  Mention which area of the panel is involved (machines, ARK
instances, plugin config, players, ArkShop, etc.).

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you would like to happen, ideally with a
concrete example of the desired UI flow or API behaviour.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you considered and why they would not work as well.

## Additional context
Screenshots, links, related plugin documentation, etc.

> Note: contributions are welcome but please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
> first — ArkManiaGest is source-available, not open source, and PRs
> require accepting the contribution-licence clause.
